---
title: Admonitions
description: Custom SVG icons for each admonition type in the Trellis theme.
keywords: [admonitions, icons, note, tip, info, caution, danger]
last_update:
  date: 02/20/2026
  author: Trellis
---

Trellis replaces the default Docusaurus admonition icons with custom SVG icons, giving each type a distinct visual identity.

## Admonition Types

:::note
**Note** — use for supplementary information that adds context.
:::

:::tip
**Tip** — use for best practices and recommendations.
:::

:::info
**Info** — use for important context the reader should be aware of.
:::

:::caution
**Caution** — use for things that could cause issues if ignored.
:::

:::danger
**Danger** — use for critical warnings about data loss, security, or breaking changes.
:::

## Syntax

Admonitions use the standard Docusaurus `:::` syntax:

```markdown
:::note
This is a note.
:::

:::tip
This is a tip.
:::

:::info
This is informational.
:::

:::caution
Be careful with this.
:::

:::danger
This is critical — read carefully.
:::
```

## Custom Titles

Add a custom title after the type:

```markdown
:::tip Best Practice
Always run `yarn build` before deploying.
:::
```

:::tip Best Practice
Always run `yarn build` before deploying.
:::

## How the Icons Work

Each admonition type has a dedicated icon component in `src/theme/Admonition/Icon/`:

```
src/theme/Admonition/Icon/
├── Note.js      # Information circle icon
├── Tip.js       # Lightbulb icon
├── Info.js      # Information circle variant
├── Danger.js    # Exclamation triangle icon
└── Warning.js   # Warning triangle icon
```

Each component exports an SVG element. To customize an icon, edit the corresponding file:

```jsx title="src/theme/Admonition/Icon/Note.js"
import React from 'react';
export default function AdmonitionIconNote(props) {
  return (
    <svg viewBox="0 0 14 16" {...props}>
      <path
        fillRule="evenodd"
        d="M6.3 5.69a.942.942 0 0 1-.28-.7c0-.28.09-.52.28-.7..."
      />
    </svg>
  );
}
```

## Layout Customization

The admonition layout (container, heading, content) is defined in `src/theme/Admonition/Layout/index.js`. The type-specific components in `src/theme/Admonition/Type/` combine the icon and layout for each admonition type.
